final_text:
The no-slip condition in fluid mechanics states that the fluid velocity at a solid boundary equals the velocity of the boundary.  
Since the plate moves at 0.01 m/s, the fluid at the interface also moves at 0.01 m/s.

[ANSWER]B[/ANSWER]
